summary: Tested Sprint A+B+C (10 low-hanging items). Backend 8/10 passed, 2 skipped (LLM Groq TPD rate-limit for quick-plan confidence; signup disabled so multi-tenant isolation skipped). Frontend testids all present on /dashboard and /business; /growth confidence-score not rendered because no quick plan could be generated (LLM 429).

minor.issue: Groq daily token limit (429) reached in preview env — blocks confidence_score verification. Feature code path exists (server.py:2910). Main agent should verify with a fresh key or wait for TPD reset.
Signup returned non-200 for fresh non-admin user — multi-tenant isolation test skipped. If signups are intentionally admin-invite-only, update test to seed via db.users directly.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot visually verify — upstream quick-plan/generate 429 from Groq. No cached quick_plan in DB has confidence_score populated (older plans).

action_items: Wait for Groq TPD reset or rotate key, then re-run tests/test_sprint_abc.py::TestQuickPlanConfidence to fully validate GL-01 confidence_score/band/factors end-to-end.
Multi-tenant isolation: if signup is disabled in preview, provide a seed helper or enable test-mode signup so future iterations can verify ws(user) scoping on /activity/recent.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exceeds 7500 lines — split by domain (auth, business, growth, dispatcher, integrations) for maintainability.
_PROFANITY_RE uses \b boundaries — will miss inflections like 'fucking'/'shitty'. Consider removing trailing \b or adding stemmed variants so real user typos get caught, not just standalone lemmas.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all testids present; confidence-score not rendered due to upstream LLM 429)

seed_data_creation: Direct DB inserts into content_kits + content_schedules for dispatcher gate tests; cleaned up after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Groq daily token limit was exhausted during iter22 — quick-plan/generate returns 502. Re-running after reset (or with a different LLM key) will flip TestQuickPlanConfidence from skipped to passed. Signup appears locked down; if a test helper to mint non-admin users is added, unskip TestActivityFeed::test_multitenant_isolation.
rca of the issue: Two skips are env-only: (1) Groq TPD limit on preview — not an app bug; (2) /api/auth/signup likely returns 403/400 under current config — investigate ENABLE_PUBLIC_SIGNUP flag or call admin-invite endpoint in test fixture.
